response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken English audio matches the context of a merchandise promotion described in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized the summary to identify the segment; performed manual transcription of the English dialogue and matched it with the prominent Japanese on-screen captions. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to the vocal activation of the speaker, with aggressive truncation applied to handle rapid speech and transitions. Japanese burnt-in text is used for the 'og' field to provide a comprehensive dual-language output.

subtitles.original: ハロー、愛するみんな
subtitles.english: Hello, sweethearts!

subtitles.original: Lovely to see you, to see you... Lovely!
subtitles.english: Lovely to see you, to see you... Lovely!

subtitles.original: ERB TVの初放送はどうだった？
subtitles.english: What did you think of the first show on ERB TV?

subtitles.original: 楽しんでくれたかしら？選曲はどう思った？
subtitles.english: Did you enjoy it? What did you think of the song choices?

subtitles.original: 素晴らしいゲストたちと一緒にパフォーマンスできて 私は本当に嬉しかったわ
subtitles.english: I really hope you loved it as much as I loved performing with such amazing guests.

subtitles.original: Huzzah!
subtitles.english: Huzzah!

subtitles.original: ロザリアンのみんな 準備はいい？
subtitles.english: Rosarians, to arms! Are you ready?

subtitles.original: サプライズの準備はできててる？
subtitles.english: Are you ready for the surprise?

subtitles.original: みんなに見せたい素敵なものがあるの
subtitles.english: I have something lovely to present to all of you.

subtitles.original: 誕生日記念グッズよ！
subtitles.english: I have birthday merch!

subtitles.original: まずはこちら
subtitles.english: First up is this.

subtitles.original: この誕生日記念グッズの美しいキービジュアルが タペストリーになったわ！
subtitles.english: The beautiful key visual art of this birthday merch is on a tapestry!

subtitles.original: ボビーとロザリアンと一緒にリラックスしているところなの
subtitles.english: I'm relaxing with Bobby and a cute Rosarian after a dance workout.

subtitles.original: この素敵なレトロ風タペストリーを飾って 写真を撮って私に見せてね！
subtitles.english: Please display this wonderful retro-style tapestry and take pictures for me to see please!

subtitles.original: みんながどんな風にお部屋に飾ってくれるかすごく楽しみだね
subtitles.english: Would absolutely love to see how you decorate the room with it.

subtitles.original: テレビスタジオに来てくれたんだから 自分専用のERB TVマグカップも手に入れてね
subtitles.english: As you've visited the TV studio, make sure to pick up your very own ERB TV mug.

subtitles.original: テレビで私を見ながらこれで水分補給してね！
subtitles.english: Use it to hydrate while watching me on the telly.

subtitles.original: 「お母さん私ERB TVに出てるよ！」
subtitles.english: Mom, I'm on ERB TV!

subtitles.original: 「見て テレビに出てるわ！」
subtitles.english: Hey Mom, I'm on the telly!

subtitles.original: たぶん今頃クイーンマザーもこれを見ているわね
subtitles.english: I go saying that and most likely right now Queen Mother is watching this on the telly.

subtitles.original: 次はみんなも私も欲しがっていたもの...
subtitles.english: Next, you've all been wanting this, and so have I...

subtitles.original: ロザリアンのぬいぐるみよ！
subtitles.english: A Rosarian plushie!

subtitles.original: 超ハッピー〜
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm so freaking happy!

subtitles.original: 私の冒険は忠実で素晴らしいロザリアンのみんながいなければ成り立たなかった
subtitles.english: My adventures have been nothing without my loyal amazing Rosarians.

subtitles.original: これであなただけのブラッドフレイム王国の力強いロザリアンを飼えるわね
subtitles.english: Now you can have your very own Rosarian Bloodflame Kingdom powerful pooch.

subtitles.original: 私はあなたの剣 あなたは私の盾 私たちは一緒なら最強！
subtitles.english: I am your sword and you are my shield. We are powerful together.

subtitles.original: That's right!
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: 次は激アツ ピンバッジ4個セットよ！
subtitles.english: Next, we have a set of four pin badges.

subtitles.original: 私がピンバッジ集めが大好きなのは知っているわよね
subtitles.english: Y'all know I love collecting pin badges.

subtitles.original: 新しいコレクションに加えてね
subtitles.english: And here's some new ones for you to collect.

subtitles.original: ERB TVロゴ シールド 肉球 そしてBFKヘッドバンドをしたロザリアンよ
subtitles.english: We have the ERB TV logo badge, shield badge, Rosarian paw, and a Rosarian with a headband on saying BFK.

subtitles.original: レペゼン Blood Flame Kingdom
subtitles.english: Bloodflame Kingdom represent!

subtitles.original: 80年代風のヘッドバンドすごく似合っているわよ
subtitles.english: You all look amazing with an 80s headband on, I must say.

subtitles.original: 最後に英語と日本語の両方で新しいボイスパックを収録したわ
subtitles.english: Lastly, I recorded another voice pack in both English and Japanese.

subtitles.original: ボイスパックのタイトルは「エリザベスと体操」
subtitles.english: The voice pack is called Exercise with Elizabeth.

subtitles.original: 一緒に運動して私たちの修行に加わってね
subtitles.english: So join me on our training arc as we exercise together.

subtitles.original: さらなる高みを目指すために...！
subtitles.english: Onwards and upwards!

subtitles.original: フルセットを購入してくれた方には フルセット購入特典があるわね！
subtitles.english: Then if you purchase the whole set, the full shebang, there's a full set purchase bonus.

subtitles.original: キービジュアルのポストカードがもらえるんだけどそれだけじゃないの
subtitles.english: You get a postcard with the key visual on it, but that's not all.

subtitles.original: 数量限定版には 私の直筆サイン入りポストカードが入っているわ
subtitles.english: The limited quantity includes a postcard with a handwritten signature by yours truly.

subtitles.original: 限定版がなくなっても 複製サイン入りのポストカードはもらえるからね
subtitles.english: Please do not worry, even when those run out, you still get the postcard with my replica signature.

subtitles.original: 以上が生誕グッズのフルセットでした！
subtitles.english: And that is the full set of my birthday merch.

subtitles.original: どうだったかしら？
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: グッズには愛を込めたわ
subtitles.english: There's been a lot of love put into this merch.

subtitles.original: 特にロザリアンを抱っこするのが待ちきれない！
subtitles.english: And I especially can't wait to cuddle my own Rosarian plushie!

subtitles.original: ライブが終わる前に ゲストのみんなに特別な感謝を伝えたいわ
subtitles.english: Wow, before we wrap up, I'd like to give a special thanks to the guests.

subtitles.original: みんなと一緒にパフォーマンスできて光栄だったわ
subtitles.english: It is an honor performing with you all. I'll treasure these sweet memories forever.

subtitles.original: スタッフのみんなも素晴らしい仕事をありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you to the crew, amazing job everyone.

subtitles.original: 振り付けを教えてくれたダンスの先生たちもありがとう 誇らしい気持ちにさせられたかな
subtitles.english: Thank you to my dance teachers who made the choreo. I hope it made you proud with my moving and grooving.

subtitles.original: そしてなによりもロザリアンのみんな 最初の誕生日ライブを見てくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Most of all, thank you, my beautiful kingdom, my Rosarians, for checking out my first birthday live.

subtitles.original: ERB TVの初放送！
subtitles.english: First ERB TV show!

subtitles.original: 最高の曲ばかりだったわよね？
subtitles.english: Those were some bops and a half, right?

subtitles.original: 美味しいものを食べて 水分補給してしっかり寝るのよ
subtitles.english: Okay, make sure to eat good noms, hydrate, get good sleeps,

subtitles.original: 私たちの王国を素晴らしく強く保ちたいからね
subtitles.english: because we want our kingdom to be good and strong.

subtitles.original: みんなのことが大好き
subtitles.english: I love you all very much.

subtitles.original: そして何より私の声がみんなの力になりますように
subtitles.english: And most of all, let my voice be your strength.

subtitles.original: ByeBye~
subtitles.english: Bye bye!

subtitles.original: You're watching ERB TV
subtitles.english: You're watching ERB TV
